name: Geotechnical Solution
description: A geotechnical engineering platform for managing soil testing, lab results, and automated PDF report generation for construction and infrastructure projects.
features: Automated PDF report generation with PdfSharp
Soil test data management with CRUD operations
Data seeding for rapid environment setup
Role-based access for engineers and lab technicians

name: Sales & Inventory Management
description: A modular SaaS platform for managing sales pipelines, inventory tracking, and order fulfillment across multiple business units.
features: Modular monolith architecture with clear domain boundaries
Real-time inventory tracking and stock alerts
Sales pipeline management with reporting dashboards

name: Hotel Management System
description: A comprehensive hotel management SaaS system handling reservations, guest management, billing, and housekeeping operations with DDD architecture.
features: Integration test coverage for core workflows

name: Visit Management
description: A cross-platform visit and field-service management system with configurable approval workflows, built for both mobile and desktop use.
features: Cross-platform via .NET MAUI and Blazor Hybrid
Modular monolith with independent feature modules

name: Automobile Solution
description: An automobile service and parts management system built with CQRS pattern for clean separation of reads and writes, featuring a MudBlazor UI.
features: CQRS with MediatR for clean command/query separation
MudBlazor component library for rich UI

name: LMS (Kidoo)
description: A learning management system for educational institutions, later restructured from monolith to modular architecture for better scalability.
features: Migration from monolith to modular monolith
ASP.NET Core MVC with server-side rendering

name: Mentoring Platform
description: A SaaS mentoring platform connecting mentors and mentees with scheduling, session tracking, and progress analytics.
features: Built on ASP.NET Zero multi-tenant framework

name: Campaign Management
description: A campaign management tool for planning, executing, and tracking marketing and outreach campaigns with performance metrics.

name: Task Management
description: A cross-platform task management application built with .NET MAUI Hybrid, enabling teams to track work items across mobile and desktop.

name: Hospital Management
description: A hospital management SaaS system for patient records, appointment scheduling, and department coordination with a Blazor-based interface.
features: Blazor Server for real-time UI updates

name: Business Integration Platform
description: An integration platform that syncs business data between internal systems and external services like HubSpot, enabling unified CRM and sales operations.
features: HubSpot CRM integration and data sync
ABP modular architecture with Angular frontend

name: ERP Platform
description: A large-scale ERP platform built with microservices architecture, covering sales, inventory, CRM, and financial modules for enterprise operations.
features: Angular frontend with shared component library
